summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FX Broker back-office accounting system. All core functionalities working correctly including authentication, dashboard, client management, trading accounts, transactions, and reports.

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings for width/height dimensions
design_issues.impact: Charts display correctly but console warnings appear

design_issues.issue: Minor accessibility warnings for dialog descriptions
design_issues.impact: Dialog functionality works but missing aria descriptions

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with proper branding
Dashboard displays stats, charts, and recent activity
Clients CRUD operations (create, read, update, search, filter)
Trading Accounts page loads with account data
Reports page with multiple tabs and analytics charts
Settings page shows user info and admin features
Dark theme (Obsidian Ledger) with neon cyan accents
